items.name: SYS_REQ_001: Vehicle Speed Estimation
items.description: The control system shall estimate the vehicle speed with an accuracy of +/- 0.5 km/h.

items.name: SYS_REQ_002: Steering Angle Sensor Input
items.description: The control system shall read and filter steering angle raw sensor input at 100Hz.

items.name: SYS_ARC_001: Sensor Abstraction Layer Component
items.description: Defines the architecture and interfaces for raw sensor abstraction components.
